metadata.name: Grant HRIS Access to a New Manager

description: A newly promoted manager needs access to the manager self-service portal in the HRIS.

nodes.task_description: Receive the access request for the new manager.

expected_outcome.value: HRIS admin receives a ticket to grant access.

nodes.task_description: Identify the employee's record in the HRIS.
Assign the 'Manager' security role to the employee's user profile.

expected_outcome.value: Admin successfully updates the user's permissions in the system.
